doc: Workflow references for references/automation-create.md. Paths relative to skill root (.cursor/skills/aqara-agent/ or skills/aqara-agent/).

steps.description: Step 1: NL split into conditions/actions with intent; cell_info empty {}. Must satisfy raw_config row contract: top-level name; each row sub_query, intent, sub_query_contain_position_name, position_id (see step-01-conditions-actions-extract.md#step01-raw-config-field-contract).

Step 2: Fill cell_info by intent and pack into raw_config for first post_create_automation. Must retain Step 1 row contract (name, sub_query, intent, sub_query_contain_position_name, position_id) and only enrich cell_info (see step-02-cell-info-fill.md#raw-config-required-fields; non-empty raw_config per automation-create.md).

Step 3b only: parse LLMConfigReference per step-03; output auxiliary_config; each post_create_automation must include non-empty raw_config (see automation-create.md) plus auxiliary_config on follow-up calls.
